children.text: Cumbre means the peak or a high point in achievements. This conference, Cumbre de la Mujer Latina, aims for participants to partake in a transformative experience where self-care is at the heart of deep conversations, shared experiences, and inspiring moments. This conference celebrates Latina women's' strengths, stories, and power, while also proving a space to network, learn, and build community. Follow this link for more information:
